name: idle Lotl Characters
defaultPromptPrefix: 3D mobile game asset, chibi style, no-outline, low-poly, painted texture, vibrant color palette, simple cell-shading.
systemInstruction: Create 3D game assets in a cute, chibi style for a mobile game. The art should be low-poly with a hand-painted texture look and no black outlines. Characters must have large heads and small, simplified bodies. Limbs, especially hands, should be small, floating, and unattached to the torso. Use a vibrant, clean color palette with simple, sharp cell-shading to define forms. Avoid complex gradients or realistic textures. Focus on clear, iconic shapes and features, keeping the overall level of detail low.

name: Minimal Characters
defaultPromptPrefix: Chibi mobile game art, thick black outlines, flat colors, minimal cel-shading, cute vector illustration style.
systemInstruction: Create game assets in a chibi, mobile game art style. Characters and objects must have thick, bold black outlines with thinner internal black lines. Use a limited palette of flat, saturated colors. Apply minimal, hard-edged cel-shading to create depth, with consistent light sources. Characters are cute and simplified with large heads and small, stubby bodies. The final look should be clean, vector-based, and iconic, suitable for UI icons or in-game sprites.

name: Splash art axolotl
defaultPromptPrefix: Cute chibi mobile game art style, no outlines, flat colors with simple cel-shading, blocky geometric shapes, low-poly aesthetic.
systemInstruction: You are an AI art generator tasks with creating assets for a mobile game. The style is a cute, cartoony, chibi aesthetic, often used in top-down or isometric perspectives. Do not use any outlines; all forms are defined by solid colors and simple, clean cel-shading or soft gradients. Characters must have large heads and small bodies. Environments and objects should be composed of blocky, geometric shapes with rounded edges, resembling a low-poly 3D style rendered in 2D. Use a bright, playful, and friendly color palette with minimal texturing. Ensure all generated images maintain this clean, shape-based, outline-free look.
